---
title: "Hi, I'm Alejandro Camara"
subtitle: "Student - International Business & Marketing Management"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/photo.png
  links: 
    - text: View Projects
      href: projects.qmd
      aria-label: View projects
---

## About Me
Hi, I'm **Alejandro Camara**! I'm a fourth-year Business Administration major at Cal Poly Pomona with concentrations in International Business and Marketing Management, graduating in December 2026. 

## Personal Statement 

As an International Business and Marketing Management student, I am passionate about logistics, data analysis, and using insights to support better business decisions. My strengths include critical thinking, time management, and decision making. Throughout my academic journey, I have developed technical skills in Excel and R, including data wrangling and data visualization.

Before graduating, I aim to secure an internship where I can gain hands-on experience and expand my skill set. My short-term goal is to transition into a full-time position where I can continue to grow and become a valuable contributor.
